Order To Show Caue Re: Contempt Against Defendant Edward L. Novak
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Continued To May-01-15 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Tamara Willat CSR#4609. (415) 272 1753.
Lawrence M. Scancarelli, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Judgment Creditor Elvia Juarez.
Defendant and Judgment Debtor Edward Novak appearing on his own behalf.

Order to Show Cause Re: Contempt against Defendant Edward L. Novak, Code of Civil Procedure Section 1212 is heard this day. No opposition was filed by Mr. Novak.

After argument of respective parties the court Ordered the proceedings continued to May 1, 2015 at 2:00 PM in Department 514.
Court ordered counsel for moving party to serve Mr. Novak with Interrogatories on or before March 17, 2015. Service via e-mail or US mail. Court ordered Mr. Novak to serve Responses to interrogatories on or before April 13, 2015. Parties ordered to return to Department 514. No further notice is required.
Court ordered Mr. Scancarelli to prepare and submit a proposed order for the court's signature within five days.

Order To Show Caue Re: Contempt Against Defendant Edward L. Novak

MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 OEX - Judge Donald Sullivan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha.
Lawrence Scancarelli for Plaintiff. Defendant Edward Novak present in pro per. No appearance by Elizabeth Karnazes, Esq. and no substitution of attorney file with the court. Proceedings reported by Joan Merten #6922.
The Court hears defendant's Ex Parte Mtn. for continuance, after hearing the testimony and considering of the arguments the court granted Defendant's Mtn., continued the OEX to 06-19-12 @ 2:00 p.m. Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees $690.00 and court reporter's fee $375.00 are granted, total $1,065.00 payable within 60 days. Mr. Novak to inform Ms. Karnazes to file the substitution of attorney within 48 hrs.
Mr. Scancarelli to prepare the order and submit to Dept.514 for signature.
